title: Revised direction issued to Devon County Council: June 2025
body: "This direction requires the council to cooperate with a commissioner appointed by the Secretary of State for Education.  It follows a 13 May 2025 Ofsted report that judged children’s services to be inadequate.  This direction replaces the earlier statutory direction issued to the council in October 2022. "

taxons.title: Inspections of local authority children's services
